entries.section: Leveling Tips for Elemental Shaman DPS in TBC Classic
entries.text: Stoneclaw Totem is your best friend when dealing with multiple enemies at once. In TBC, it has the new power of stunning enemies who attack it very often, making it much better at actually distracting enemies long enough for you to kill them one by one without breaking a sweat. Do not sleep on this totem—try it out on those tough multi-mob pulls.

entries.section: Leveling Tips for Elemental Shaman DPS in TBC Classic
entries.text: Make sure to train Ghost Wolf as soon as you hit Level 20, as it will make your leveling much faster until you can get a proper mount at Level 30!

entries.section: Leveling Tips for Elemental Shaman DPS in TBC Classic
entries.text: Try to group your spell casts together. The "5 second" rule determines that your mana can only naturally regenerate when you have not cast anything for 5 seconds, which means that you can get a significant amount of mana back from remembering to refresh Lightning Shield , using your spells, and healing yourself in consecutive global cooldowns, rather than spacing these casts out.

entries.section: Leveling Tips for Elemental Shaman DPS in TBC Classic
entries.text: No matter what you are doing, whenever you are at full mana, stop and kill 1-2 enemies before continuing on your journey. This will give you a lot of extra experience in the long run and allow you to always be using your natural mana regeneration.

entries.section: Leveling Tips for Elemental Shaman DPS in TBC Classic
entries.text: While they do not give any end-game power, gathering professions such as Herbalism and Skinning are great while leveling, as you can level them up as you move from zone to zone and get some free gold by selling the gathered materials.
